title: anthistiria gigantea subsp. intermedia
intro: Anthistiria gigantea subsp. intermedia, also known as Giant Spear-grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Anthistiria gigantea subsp. intermedia include its ability to alleviate congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
